title: NeoProEd Launches to Build India's Next Generation of Insurance & Insurtech Leaders
description: Mumbai (Maharashtra) [India], July 3: India's insurance industry is entering one of the most transformative periods in its history. Driven by digital innovation, artificial intelligence, embedded insurance, regulatory reforms, and rapid market expansion, the sector is projected to create thousands of new opportunities over the coming decade. Yet, one challenge continues to threaten this growth, a severe shortage of professionally trained talent.
